title: Review: jmap-chat idiomaticity pass
notes: SEC7 calibration. Reviewed commit ecd4122 and all 10 child issues. Stylistic labels applied: 7c2.3 (doc-comment request duplicating 7c2.1), 7c2.7 (duplicate of 7c2.1), 7c2.8 (doc-comment preference for justified design). Real engineering findings kept: 7c2.1 (MessageRevision.body_type type mismatch), 7c2.2 (BodyType missing Display), 7c2.4 (application/jmap-chat-rich falls into Unknown), 7c2.6 (dual canonical paths), 7c2.9 (skip_serializing_if dead on Deserialize-only struct), 7c2.10 (filter_presence guard invisible at definition). Confidence: 90% no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (a) methods/chat.rs, methods/message.rs, methods/space.rs, methods/misc.rs not reviewed; analogous type-correctness issues may exist in those files. Would raise confidence if those four files were reviewed. Running out of real complaints: YES for the four reviewed files in scope.
